mapper.sql: c.cargo_id AS cargoId, c.cargo_type AS cargoType, c.weight, c.status, c.origin_name AS originName, c.origin_lat AS originLat, c.origin_lng AS originLng, c.destination_name AS destinationName, c.destination_lat AS destinationLat, c.destination_lng AS destinationLng, c.loaded_at AS loadedAt, c.delivered_at AS deliveredAt, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt, v.id AS vehicleId, v.plate AS vehiclePlate, v.driver_name AS driverName, v.driver_phone AS driverPhone
FROM cargo c LEFT JOIN cargo_vehicle_binding b ON b.cargo_id = c.cargo_id AND b.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN vehicles v ON v.id = b.vehicle_id

where.if: AND ( c.cargo_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.cargo_type ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.origin_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.destination_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR v.plate ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM cargo_vehicle_binding WHERE cargo_id = #{cargoId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM cargo_vehicle_binding WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cargo_status_logs ( id, cargo_id, status, lat, lng, remark, operator_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{cargoId}, #{status}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{remark}, #{operatorId}, now() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, cargo_id AS cargoId, vehicle_id AS vehicleId, status, bound_at AS boundAt, unbound_at AS unboundAt FROM cargo_vehicle_binding WHERE cargo_id = #{cargoId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
SELECT id, cargo_id as cargoId, status, lat, lng, remark, operator_id as operatorId, created_at as createdAt FROM cargo_status_logs WHERE cargo_id = #{cargoId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cargo ( cargo_id, cargo_type, weight, status, origin_name, origin_lat, origin_lng, destination_name, destination_lat, destination_lng, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{cargoId}, #{cargoType}, #{weight}, #{status}, #{originName}, #{originLat}, #{originLng}, #{destinationName}, #{destinationLat}, #{destinationLng}, now(), now() )
INSERT INTO cargo_vehicle_binding ( id, cargo_id, vehicle_id, status, bound_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{cargoId}, #{vehicleId}, #{status}, now() )
mapper.update: UPDATE cargo SET status = #{status}, loaded_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'LOADED' AND loaded_at IS NULL THEN now() ELSE loaded_at END, updated_at = now() WHERE cargo_id = #{cargoId}
UPDATE cargo_vehicle_binding SET status = 'UNBOUND', unbound_at = now() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
